Document:
# Server Rules Welcome to Carpmosia!
Please make sure to read through all the rules below, as admins and other players will treat you as if you have read and understood them. If any clarification is needed please do not feel afraid to ask in Ahelp. You can access the Ahelp menu by either clicking the administrative help icon on the in game UI or by pressing "F1" at anytime.
# Core Rules These rules apply at all times, even in-between the rounds and on the Discord community as well.
- [textlink="0. Admins have final say" link="CarpmosiaRuleC0"] - [textlink="1. No shock content" link="CarpmosiaRuleC1"] - [textlink="2. Be inclusive" link="CarpmosiaRuleC2"] - [textlink="3. Build a community" link="CarpmosiaRuleC3"] - [textlink="4. Be over the age of 17" link="CarpmosiaRuleC4"] - [textlink="5. Don't cheat" link="CarpmosiaRuleC5"] - [textlink="6. Admin decisions stay private" link="CarpmosiaRuleC6"] - [textlink="7. No AI generative content" link="CarpmosiaRuleC7"]
# Roleplay Rules
Roleplay rules are in effect at all times when you are in game. The only exceptions to this are during the deathmatch gamemode or if an admin explicitly states otherwise.
Roleplay rules are in effect even while at Central Command, at the end of the round.
Roleplay rules do not apply to ghosts/spectators/observers while they are ghosts/spectators/observers. Dead chat is considered to be an in-game out of character chat channel.
See the list of [textlink="role types" link="RoleTypes"] for more information about the different types of roles.
- [textlink="0. Don't be an asshole" link="CarpmosiaRuleR0"] - [textlink="1. Don't abuse out of character knowledge" link="CarpmosiaRuleR1"] - [textlink="2. Roleplay a character that fits into the world" link="CarpmosiaRuleR2"] - [textlink="3. Follow your role" link="CarpmosiaRuleR3"] - [textlink="4. Act responsible as an antagonist" link="CarpmosiaRuleR4"] - [textlink="5. Follow reasonable escalation" link="CarpmosiaRuleR5"] - [textlink="6. Act professional as Command of Security" link="CarpmosiaRuleR6"]
# Silicon Rules You are only silicon if the game clearly and explicitly tells you that you are a silicon. For players who are silicons, these Silicon Rules override all roleplay rules if there is any conflict. Silicon Rules do not override core rules.
- [textlink="0. Your silicon laws are rules" link="CarpmosiaRuleS0"] - [textlink="1. Laws must be prioritized by their order" link="CarpmosiaRuleS1"] - [textlink="2. Laws can redefine terms used in other laws" link="CarpmosiaRuleS2"] - [textlink="3. You cannot request or allow a law change" link="CarpmosiaRuleS3"] - [textlink="4. You are a free agent if you have no laws" link="CarpmosiaRuleS4"] - [textlink="5. You are not required to follow orders which are extremely unreasonable" link="CarpmosiaRuleS5"] - [textlink="6. You must remain consistent with your interpretation of laws" link="CarpmosiaRuleS6"] - [textlink="7. Your HUD determines who is crew" link="CarpmosiaRuleS7"] - [textlink="8. Harm refers to physical harm, prioritized by immediacy and likelihood" link="CarpmosiaRuleS8"] - [textlink="9. You may determine how you resolve conflicts between orders" link="CarpmosiaRuleS9"]
